name: Bretton AI
oneliner: Agentic AI platform that automates high-volume financial crime compliance workflows — AML investigations, KYC reviews, and fraud screening — at regulated banks and fintechs.
finserv: In production at OCC/FDIC/Federal Reserve-regulated banks; customers include Robinhood, Mercury, Gusto; 1.2M+ investigations completed; $10M+ compliance cost savings documented
team: YC alumni; backed by Sapphire Ventures (Rajeev Dham board seat), Greylock, Thomson Reuters Ventures
thesis: Bretton AI is the clearest early proof point that agent-native compliance is production-ready in regulated financial services — exactly the kind of infrastructure You would need to safely deploy AI agents in supervised workflows.
